title: Workshops
description: We run engaging workshops tailored to editorial, product, and communication teams. These can focus on a specific challenge your team is facing or take the form of a language quiz or other team-building activity.

Workshops are a great way to explore complex topics in depth — for example, how to express emotions in an interface or how to communicate with users during a crisis. They can also be fun, helping teams learn together and strengthen connections.
whatYouGet: A custom workshop designed specifically for your team (2–3 hours).
A review and discussion of the exercises and outcomes.
